---
title: "HiTOP Instruments"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
toc: false
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{HiTOP Instruments}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

The HiTOP Society maintains three self-report measures of psychopathology at
different lengths and levels of coverage. Choose the one that fits your study
below, then head to its page to download ready-to-use files or explore the
`hitop` R package tools for scoring and customization.

```{=html}
<div class="row mt-4 hitop-downloads">

  <div class="col-md-4 mb-4">
    <div class="card h-100 shadow-sm">
      <div class="card-body d-flex flex-column">
        <h5 class="card-title">📋 HiTOP Self-Report (SR)</h5>
        <p class="card-text text-muted mb-1">405 items · 76 scales · 17 subscales</p>
        <p class="card-text">The full-length measure, offering the most detailed
        coverage of the HiTOP hierarchy from broad spectra down to narrow
        subscales.</p>
        <div class="d-grid mt-auto">
          <a href="../articles/download-hitopsr.html" class="btn btn-primary">View &amp; download →</a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="col-md-4 mb-4">
    <div class="card h-100 shadow-sm">
      <div class="card-body d-flex flex-column">
        <h5 class="card-title">📄 HiTOP Brief Report (BR)</h5>
        <p class="card-text text-muted mb-1">45 items · 8 scales</p>
        <p class="card-text">A short screening measure covering the eight broad
        HiTOP spectra, ideal when respondent time is limited.</p>
        <div class="d-grid mt-auto">
          <a href="../articles/download-hitopbr.html" class="btn btn-primary">View &amp; download →</a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="col-md-4 mb-4">
    <div class="card h-100 shadow-sm">
      <div class="card-body d-flex flex-column">
        <h5 class="card-title">🧪 HiTOP Harmful Substance Use (HSUM)</h5>
        <p class="card-text text-muted mb-1">Up to 650 items · 3 assessment stages</p>
        <p class="card-text">A dedicated substance-use module with skip/display
        logic, so most respondents answer only a small subset of items.</p>
        <div class="d-grid mt-auto">
          <a href="../articles/download-hitophsum.html" class="btn btn-primary">View &amp; download →</a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>
```
